commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Addressing those who have believed, he says, "For by His stripes we were healed."

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: The ass was the type of the body of Christ, upon whom all men, resting from their labours, are borne as in a chariot. For the Saviour has taken up the burden of our sins.

commentaries.author: Polycarp of Smyrna
commentaries.content: Let us then continually persevere in our hope, and the earnest of our righteousness, which is Jesus Christ, "who bore our sins in His own body on the tree"
